reasoning: Primary endpoint PASI 75 achievement reported with exact counts: 263/338 in adalimumab group vs 10/87 in placebo group. This is the primary efficacy endpoint for the Anti-TNF alpha versus placebo comparison.

source_quote: amlodipine increased the myocardial T2* from 40.63±5.45 ms at baseline to 43.25±5.35 ms (p<0.001)
reasoning: Text reports baseline T2* 40.63±5.45 ms increasing to 43.25±5.35 ms in amlodipine group. For comparison with placebo, I interpret baseline as control and 6-month as treatment. MD = 43.25 - 40.63 = 2.62 ms.

source_quote: MIC of patients receiving amlodipine (n=20)...At baseline, the mean was 0.76±0.11 mg/g dry weight, while at 6 months, the mean was 0.51±0.07 mg/g dry weight (p<0.001)
reasoning: Baseline MIC 0.76±0.11 mg/g, at 6 months 0.51±0.07 mg/g in amlodipine group (n=20). MD = 0.51 - 0.76 = -0.25 mg/g reduction.
